editor_settings.title: The Truth About the Canon G7X, Is It Actually a Mirrorless Camera?
editor_settings.content:
1. The Mirrorless Myth

Because of its premium build and high image quality, a lot of beginners assume the Canon G7X Mark III is a mirrorless camera. Let's clear this up immediately: It is not a mirrorless camera. It is a premium compact point-and-shoot camera.

2. What's the Difference?

Mirrorless interchangeable-lens cameras (MILC) allow you to remove the lens and swap it for another—like putting on a 50mm portrait lens, then switching to a 200mm zoom. The Canon G7X series has a fixed, permanently attached lens.

@rominagafur Canon g7x settings I always use to take pictures. This works great for both Mark II and Mark III #g7x

3. Why the Confusion?

The confusion stems from its 1-inch sensor. Most point-and-shoots have tiny sensors that are barely larger than a smartphone. The G7X uses a massive 1-inch sensor, giving it depth-of-field (background blur) and low-light capabilities that rival budget mirrorless cameras.

4. Is "Compact" Bad?

Not at all. In fact, many professional photographers buy the G7X specifically because it is NOT an interchangeable mirrorless camera. You don't have to carry a bag of heavy lenses. You just slide it into your pocket and still get exceptional raw photos and 4K video.

3. Why the Confusion?

The confusion stems from its 1-inch sensor. Most point-and-shoots have tiny sensors that are barely larger than a smartphone. The G7X uses a massive 1-inch sensor, giving it depth-of-field (background blur) and low-light capabilities that rival budget mirrorless cameras.

Not at all. In fact, many professional photographers buy the G7X specifically because it is NOT an interchangeable mirrorless camera. You don't have to carry a bag of heavy lenses. You just slide it into your pocket and still get exceptional raw photos and 4K video.
editor_settings.author: Roderick Scott
editor_settings.meta_description: Everyone seems to be calling the Canon G7X Mark III a mirrorless camera online. They are completely wrong.
editor_settings.meta_keywords: cameras, truth, about, canon, actually, mirrorless, camera
